content.text: {"id":"KB-001","title":"Standard Return Policy","category":"returns","summary":"Our standard return policy allows returns within 30 days of delivery for most items.","body":"Customers may return most items within 30 days of delivery for a full refund. Items must be in their original condition and packaging. To initiate a return, log in to your account and navigate to Order History, select the order, and click \u2018Return Items\u2019. A prepaid return label will be emailed to you within 24 hours. Refunds are processed within 5\u20137 business days after we receive the returned item.","url":"https://help.example.com/returns/standard-policy","last_updated":"2026-04-01"}
